scripts.plan: npm run build && dotenv -e .env -- bash -c 'terraform plan -compact-warnings -var account_id="$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID" -var cloudflare_api_token="$CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" -var zone_name="$CLOUDFLARE_ZONE_NAME"'
scripts.deploy: npm run build && dotenv -e .env -- bash -c 'terraform apply -compact-warnings -auto-approve -var account_id="$CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID" -var cloudflare_api_token="$CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN" -var zone_name="$CLOUDFLARE_ZONE_NAME"'
